\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{SURFTHRESH}{SURFTHRESH}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{SingSub_8cpp_a6f0fb895852573460b58d770e38f45f5} 
\#define SURFTHRESH~1e-\/8}



Numerical threshold for detecting points lying near an edge or plane. 

Used in geometric tests to treat points within {\ttfamily 1e-\/8} of a surface as being on the surface. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8cpp_source_l00017}{17}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SingSub_8cpp_source}{Sing\+Sub.\+cpp}}.
